chunks.text: Switch Failure on 1st Floor of Cory | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Switch Failure on 1st Floor of Cory We have had a switch failure on the 1st floor of Cory that has a number of server and host connecti

Cory that has a number of server and host connections down in that area. It is being repaired and we hope to have it back up soon. Wireless networking in that area is also affected. UPDATE [2007-11-29 09:32:43 | Fred A Archibald] During the scheduled

09:32:43 | Fred A Archibald] During the scheduled maintenance window this morning, while running diagnostics, the switch went into a failure state that it could not recover from. The management module was replaced and the switch is now back up. The

e was replaced and the switch is now back up. The reason for the diagnostics was the failure of the switch to upload it’s current config on a daily basis. As such, the most recent config was 3 weeks old. It is possible that a few ports might not be e

ld. It is possible that a few ports might not be enabled if they were changed within the last 3 weeks. Please notify networks@eecs if you encounter any ports that did not come back after 9:00a.m. this morning. Resolved as of 2007-11-29 09:00:00 Prima

morning. Resolved as of 2007-11-29 09:00:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
